name: server-messages
description: Broadcasts scheduled announcements to all connected players. Supports sequential rotation and weighted shuffle-bag rotation.

messages.description: List of messages to broadcast. Each item must have a text field and an optional weight (positive integer, default 1).

text.description: The message text. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName} placeholders.

weight.description: How many times this message appears in the shuffle bag (only used when order=random).

order.description: Rotation mode. sequential sends messages in order; random uses weighted shuffle-bag rotation.

broadcast.description: Broadcasts the next scheduled message to all online players.
